description: A hot favourite among the casually stylish, this adidas watch from the Originals collection is a great buy for those who enjoy both performance and style. With excellent touches and grooved comfort, this watch makes for an excellent option as daily wear. Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 10 mm Dial shape: Round Plastic case with a red and black plastic strap and adidas logo Fixed bezel for added comfort Grooved strap with a tang clasp White digital dial displaying hours, minutes, seconds, date and day of the week Quartz movement of time display using a paper-thin piece of synthetic quartz to ensure accurate time measurement Solid stainless steel case back for enhanced durability 10 ATM water resistance tested using the equivalent static depth rating, with resistance at 100 meters, allowing you to use it even when snorkelling and swimming Lap memory that allows the watch to record your laps
